override_rationale: 23 mechanical dogfood failures classified as environmental (not CLI defects). User authorized ship after live exploratory verification of all four P0-fixed code paths: calls subtree (list, get, transcript, audio recording), JSON-parsed search predicates, JSON control-byte escape, and articles translated_content JSON unmarshal. Full classification preserved below and in the per-failure detail at proofs/2026-05-24-134520-fix-intercom-pp-cli-acceptance.md.

blocked_fixture.rationale: The dogfood matrix passes the literal string 'example-value' or a synthetic UUID for required flags it has no real fixture for. The CLI correctly forwards; the API correctly rejects. Real users pass real values.
commands: admins list-activity-logs --created-at-after example-value (timestamp expected as int)
contacts search --query example-value (×2 — nested predicate expected; works with --query '{...JSON...}' after the post-acceptance fix)
events list-data --filter example-value --type example-value (×2 — --type is an enum)
visitors retrieve-with-user-id --user-id <synthetic-uuid> (×2 — 404 expected for a non-existent visitor)
calls list --per-page <placeholder> (×2 — parameter_invalid; per-page is an int)
calls recording <random-id> (×2 — 404 expected; call_id is matrix-synthesized)

workspace_permission.rationale: Coco workspace doesn't have these Intercom features enabled. Verified via direct curl with the same auth token: 404 on every path variant.

api_version_drift.rationale: Intercom 2.13 OpenAPI lists internal_articles endpoints but the live API returns 'intercom_version_invalid' on the pinned version. The CLI now sends /calls/* with a per-request 2.14 override; bumping the global pin to 2.14 would also close this but would risk shifting other endpoint shapes.

live_verified_after_fixes.calls_recording: valid 31-sec WAV (RIFF/WAVE 16-bit stereo 8000 Hz) downloaded and played in afplay
live_verified_after_fixes.tickets_search_with_json_query: 875 tickets in 24h window, jq parses response cleanly
live_verified_after_fixes.json_control_byte_escape: stdout passes through jq without rejection
